title: RuSureQuit
description: QuitConfirm unofficial multi-modloader port. RuSureQuit is a client mod that displays a confirmation window when exiting saves, multiplayer sessions, or realm worlds to prevent accidental exits.
body:
# RuSureQuit

[QuitConfirm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quitconfirm) unofficial multi-modloader port.
RuSureQuit is a client mod that displays a confirmation window when exiting saves, multiplayer sessions, or realm worlds to prevent accidental exits.

## Features

* Multiple exit screen styles to choose from
* Supports displaying confirmation windows when exiting saves, multiplayer
* Features a settings panel with high configurability

## License

This mod is under the `MIT` license.

OreUI Button textures take from [OreUI-Recreation by tmc249](https://github.com/thetmc249/OreUI-Recreation). They are under the `MIT` license.
